title: Project Brazier
description: A Medieval themed RPG Mod (formerly known as Dark Roleplay Medieval)
body:
Notification: Atm this is a user request reupload of old versions of the mod. I am working on a 1.21.1 port, as soon as it's done it'll be posted here and the descriptions expanded with images and more information.

As a part of the Brazier Modding mod group, Project Brazier's aim is to create an awesome RPG experience. Even though it's not even close to being done it already contains a bunch of new things.

You can enjoy a decent amount of new building blocks & decorations.
Servers can also benefit of many vanity Items that are creative only currently.

Hello, everyone that is not reading this on Curseforge or Modrinth, but on a repost site.
Please leave the site, run a virus scan and never enter it again.
Just use [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com) or [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/) and be safe, while you support modders.
